locator.quote: two tensors of *different* shapes and dtypes. The only invariant

text: The hidden-state slot is polymorphic: LSTM (h,c) same-shape vs transformer (rolling_buffer, valid_count) — two tensors of different shapes and dtypes; the only invariant is a 2-tuple of device-movable tensors.

locator.quote: Keeping the 2-tuple-of-tensors contract means no trainer edit is

text: Keeping the 2-tuple-of-tensors contract means no trainer edit is ever required when adding a new architecture.
